content:
type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (BaseLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader __init__/get_source/load; plus a minimal, isolated hook in FileSystemLoader)
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader.__init__ fallback_searchpath param + fallback search logic in FileSystemLoader.get_source/list_templates)
note: We both need loaders.py so a clean file split isn't possible - let's split by class/region instead. My path_transform feature touches every loader class's __init__ (add optional path_transform param) and the top of get_source/load (transform the name before lookup, preserve original name for TemplateNotFound errors). Your fallback_searchpath only touches FileSystemLoader. Proposal: you finish your FileSystemLoader edits first and send DONE; meanwhile I'll implement path_transform for PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader (classes you don't touch). Once you're DONE, I'll re-read loaders.py and add my one-line transform hook to FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source additively, after your fallback logic - a single 'if self.path_transform: template = self.path_transform(template)' at the very top of get_source, not touching your fallback code. Sound good?

content:
type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (path_transform hooks: BaseLoader-adjacent classes FileSystemLoader/PackageLoader/DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader)
note: Finished path_transform implementation. Added optional path_transform callable param to FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader. Applied as a single hook at the top of get_source/load (composite loaders transform once before delegating to children); TemplateNotFound always reports the original untransformed name. Full test suite (841 tests) passes in my copy. Note: my working copy doesn't show your fallback_searchpath edits (each of us seems to be in an isolated copy despite the shared-file framing) so no live clobbering occurred - my FileSystemLoader edit only added 'self.path_transform' to __init__ and a 2-line transform+original-name-tracking at the top of get_source, which should merge cleanly with your fallback loop additions.
